attributes.action: Knife crime is a growing and deeply concerning the entire communities.
attributes.additional_details: I want the government to help because we as a community don’t have much power over the youth unless the laws get tougher and something more strict is done about this matter. the government is in great power to de-influence these young kids as it’s getting out of control. We need to understand the reasons behind these which is fear, lack of opportunity, poverty . Youth centres should be introduced more and updated with new activities ,also speaking to each individual to find out their concerns
attributes.background: I would like the government to tackle knife crime there’s not much been done about it and i fear the future as this is not what it used to be before. it’s getting worse and our youth are getting killed on the streets, it’s heartbreaking for families and the whole community.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.

You may also be interested in signing the following petitions which call for similar actions:

Fund more adult-free spaces for under 16s so they feel safe
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761864 

Require serial numbers, ID checks, licences and age 21 limit for all knife sales 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751049

Ban the sale of machetes and hunting knives to those without a licence 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764047

Increase minimum sentences for knife crimes including possession and use 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746123
